title: Orrery
source: location-framing.md → Volume: Orrery (anchor orrery); component detail + base mechanism probed in-game via tools/play.cjs
frame: +X east, +Z south, +Y up. Wide TALL six-sided chamber; the brass disk faces ~east toward the entry, tilted only ~4-5deg back from vertical, and is LIFTED off the floor on a gear/axle base (an engine of gears + shafts). Lower edge a few inches above the floor; upper edge climbs toward the dark vault. Alcove cameras (N/S) glimpse the same machine three-quarter through their archways.

parts.name: ceiling
parts.detail: high roof; the vault above the machine is lost in shadow

parts.name: raised stone dais
parts.detail: low circular stone dais the machine rises from

parts.name: gear + axle base housing
parts.detail: the engine of gears and shafts the brass disk is mounted on — the disk's lower edge floats just above this, a few inches off the floor

parts.name: base gear A
parts.detail: exposed drive gear at the base front

parts.name: base gear B
parts.detail: smaller drive gear at the base

parts.name: orrery disk
parts.detail: vast brass disk, nearly upright (tilted only ~4-5deg back from vertical), lifted clear of the floor on the gear base; engraved arcs/lines; revolves around the fixed central globe

parts.name: blue-glass globe (centre/hub, fixed)
parts.detail: large fixed blue-glass globe embedded at the disk's centre, brown/white island-map pattern; the disk rotates around it

parts.name: silver wheel (upper side)
parts.detail: silver wheel, spiralling moire metrics; on the upper side of the disk, opposite the copper wheel

parts.name: violet globe (silver wheel hub)
parts.detail: swollen glittering violet globe, streaked silver and black, at the silver wheel's centre

parts.name: tan globe (silver wheel rim)
parts.detail: tan globe on the silver wheel's rim, circled by heavy rings of frosted white glass (the blue mask is caught in the rings)

parts.name: copper wheel (lower side)
parts.detail: copper wheel, incised radial lines; on the lower side of the disk, opposite the silver wheel

parts.name: red globe (copper wheel hub)
parts.detail: large red globe banded in crimson/rust/scarlet/magenta/rose, at the copper wheel's centre

parts.name: green globe (copper wheel rim)
parts.detail: small green globe, pocked and cratered, circling the copper wheel's rim

parts.name: dangling grey strip
parts.detail: grey strip/cord of soft material hanging from the dark vault over the disk's upper edge — just out of reach

parts.name: south alcove floor
parts.detail: small curved alcove off the south side

parts.name: south alcove ladder rail W
parts.detail: iron ladder up a shaft (→ Starry Dome North)

parts.name: north alcove floor
parts.detail: small curved alcove off the north side

parts.name: north alcove stairs
parts.detail: archway onto a flight of ascending stairs (→ Curving Hall West End)

notes.orrery: anchor. low front vantage looking UP at the machine so the lifted gear-base reads (the disk floats clear of the floor) and the tall chamber + dark vault show above; nearly-upright brass disk, blue hub globe at centre, silver wheel (violet+tan) one side, copper wheel (red+green) opposite, a grey strip dangling from the vault over the top edge.
notes.south-alcove: stand in the small alcove looking through the archway at the SAME machine turning in the chamber; iron ladder up a shaft beside you.
notes.north-alcove: stand in the alcove; archway onto ascending stairs; the same machine glimpsed turning through the opening.
